amount.description: Value in specified currency's smallest unit. e.g. $10 would be represented as 1000. Can be any integer up to 36 digits.

direction.description: One of `credit`, `debit`. Describes the direction money is flowing in the transaction. A `credit` moves money from your account to someone else's. A `debit` pulls money from someone else's account to your own. Note that wire, rtp, and check payments will always be `credit`.

ledger_account_id.description: The ledger account that this ledger entry is associated with.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.
